# Website Information for LLMs
# Last Updated: 2026-06-17

## Site Overview
- URL: https://psandeepca.com/
- Type: Professional CA Firm / Accounting & Advisory Services
- Technology: React.js with React Router

## Pages and Routes

### Static Pages
- Home: /
  - Description: Main landing page for P Sandeep CA - Accounting, Tax, and Financial Advisory services
  - Priority: High
  
- About Us: /about
  - Description: Company information, mission, values, and history of the CA firm
  - Priority: High
  
- Our Team: /team
  - Description: Team members, their qualifications, and professional roles
  - Priority: Medium
  
- Services: /services
  - Description: Comprehensive list of all accounting and advisory services offered
  - Priority: High
  
- Blog: /blog
  - Description: Company blog with accounting insights, tax tips, and industry updates
  - Priority: High
  
- Contact: /contact
  - Description: Contact form, office location, and company contact information
  - Priority: Medium

### Dynamic Routes
- Service Details: /service-page/:slug
  - Pattern: /service-page/[service-name]
  - Description: Detailed information about specific accounting and advisory services
  - Examples:
    - /service-page/accounting-services
    - /service-page/tax-consulting
    - /service-page/financial-advisory
    - /service-page/business-valuation
    - /service-page/audit-assurance
  
- Blog Details: /blogs/:slug
  - Pattern: /blogs/[blog-title]
  - Description: Full blog post content with detailed articles
  - Examples:
    - /blogs/tax-planning-tips
    - /blogs/accounting-software-guide
    - /blogs/business-growth-strategies
    - /blogs/financial-planning-2026
    - /blogs/gst-compliance-guide
  
- Industry Details: /:slug
  - Pattern: /[industry-name]
  - Description: Industry-specific accounting solutions and case studies
  - Examples:
    - /technology
    - /healthcare
    - /real-estate
    - /retail
    - /manufacturing
    - /hospitality
    - /construction

## Site Structure
- Navigation: Top navbar with dropdown menus for Services and Industries
- Footer: Contains links to all major pages, contact info, and social media
- Back to Top: Floating button for user convenience

## Business Details
- Firm Name: P Sandeep CA
- Services: Chartered Accountancy, Tax Consulting, Financial Advisory, Audit & Assurance
- Target Audience: Businesses, Individuals, Startups, and Enterprises
- Industries Served: Technology, Healthcare, Real Estate, Retail, Manufacturing, Hospitality, Construction

## Special Features
- Smooth scrolling on page navigation
- Scroll restoration to top on route changes
- Responsive design for all devices
- Service detail pages with comprehensive information
- Blog system for regular content updates
- Industry-specific landing pages

## SEO Information
- The site uses React Router for client-side routing
- Dynamic content loads based on URL parameters
- All routes are accessible for search engine crawling
- Sitemap.xml and robots.txt are implemented

## Contact Information
- Website: https://psandeepca.com/
- Email: info@psandeepca.com
- Phone: [Your Phone Number]
- Address: [Your Office Address]
- Social Media: [Your Social Media Links]

## Content Update Frequency
- Blog: Weekly updates with new articles
- Services: Quarterly reviews and updates
- Team: Updated as team members join or leave
- About/Contact: Updated as needed
- Industry Pages: Updated based on market trends
- Dynamic content: Updated as needed

## Technical Notes for LLMs
- The site uses client-side rendering with React
- Dynamic content is served via APIs
- URL slugs are used for content identification
- All pages have consistent layout with Navbar and Footer components
- The site is optimized for SEO and performance

## Important URLs
- Homepage: https://psandeepca.com/
- About: https://psandeepca.com/about
- Services: https://psandeepca.com/services
- Blog: https://psandeepca.com/blog
- Contact: https://psandeepca.com/contact
- Team: https://psandeepca.com/team
- Sitemap: https://psandeepca.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://psandeepca.com/robots.txt
- LLM Info: https://psandeepca.com/llm.txt

8. Risk Management

- Tax Consultant
- Accounting Services

- Business Valuation

- CA Firm
- Accounting Firm
